reviews.comment:
Pesima atención tanto en los combustibles   cómo en el Full. Pedimos combo de hamburguesas q llegaron frias. Previa equivocacion de la vendedora q cambio mi bandeja con la de otro señor. Malisima atencion de los cobradores de la caja. Una experiemcia horrible. 😔😔

(Translated by Google)
Terrible service at both the gas station and the Full station. We ordered a burger combo that arrived cold. This was due to a mistake by the saleswoman who switched my tray with another customer's. The cashiers were also incredibly rude. A horrible experience. 😔😔
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURHMmZHWnlBRRAB
